news.headline: Author Solutions, a self-publishing company, acquired by Center Street Ventures from Najafi Companies. Original purchase in 2016.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, The Najafi Companies finalized the sale of Author Solutions, a prominent player in supported self-publishing, to Center Street Ventures. This transaction marks the conclusion of The Najafi Companies' ownership of Author Solutions, which began in 2016 when they acquired it from Penguin Random. The sale signifies a significant move within the publishing industry as Author Solutions transitions under new ownership.

news.headline: China aims for GDP growth target for 2025; 5.5% last year, 5.8% in 2021, setting new momentum for economic goals.
news.summary: On March 5, 2025, during the third session of the 14th National People's Congress in Beijing, Premier Li Qiang announced China's GDP growth target for 2025. In his government work report, Li stated important figures regarding the country's economic goals. The session highlighted key strategies and initiatives that aim to propel China's economy forward in the upcoming year. This announcement signifies the government's commitment to achieving a robust economic growth rate amid various challenges and uncertainties.

news.headline: Ivalua named a top workplace for women, diversity, and future outlook by Comparably. Received Best Company Outlook award in Q1.
news.summary: Located in Redwood City, California, on March 7, 2025, Ivalua, a renowned global spend management company, proudly declares its recent recognition by Comparably as a top workplace. In the first quarter of the year, Ivalua secured various accolades from Comparably, including the prestigious title of having the Best Company Outlook. This recognition underscores the company's dedication to providing an exceptional work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Visionary Holdings secures order for 12,000 new energy vehicles, plans battery swap network in Hong Kong.
news.summary: In a recent development, Visionary Holdings, based in Toronto, announced a major advancement in the new energy vehicle sector. The company successfully obtained an order for 12,000 new energy vehicles, specifically the Hong Kong taxi version. This accomplishment highlights the company's progress and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: Ramaco Resources, Inc. will announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 10, 2025. Conference call on March 11.
news.summary: A company based in Lexington, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB), is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 10, 2025, after the market closes. The earnings data will be released on that day.

news.headline: AI-Native Banking and Fintech Conference returns to Salt Lake City on Sept 30, 2025, focusing on real-world AI use cases.
news.summary: In its second year, the AI-Native Banking and Fintech Conference will highlight top real-world AI applications in the financial services sector. Set to take place on September 30, 2025, in Salt Lake City, this event promises to showcase the best use cases in AI within banking and fintech.

news.headline: MN Cup competition opens March 10 with $400,000 in prizes, mentorship, and connections. Largest statewide startup competition.
news.summary: A startup competition at the statewide level is providing a chance to win a total of $400,000 in prizes, along with mentorship in entrepreneurship and networking opportunities. The season for the 2025 MN Cup is commencing, with applications now open for startups, business owners, and individuals looking to venture into entrepreneurship.

news.headline: Trump's executive order on Canada and Mexico tariffs reduces the duty rate for non-USMCA-compliant potash to 10% from 25% - Federal Register Notice.
Cboe promotes Tim Lipscomb to EVP and CTO. Networking firm Cboe Global Markets, Inc. leads in derivatives.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Chicago, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the primary derivatives and securities exchange network globally, revealed the advancement of Tim Lipscomb to Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. Lipscomb has also been appointed to the company's executive team.

news.headline: Dr. George Kamel named Surgical Director at Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital, advancing pediatric craniofacial care.
news.summary: Renowned craniofacial plastic and reconstructive surgeon Dr. George Kamel has been appointed as the Surgical Director of the Pediatric Craniofacial and Plastic Surgery Program at Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital. This move aims to enhance specialized care for children requiring craniofacial and plastic surgery services. Dr. Kamel's expertise will benefit young patients in need of such surgeries, contributing to improved outcomes in this field.

news.headline: Obesity Care Week 2025 ends with a global pledge for care. "Commit to Care" theme sparks widespread engagement.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on March 7, 2025, Obesity Care Week (OCW) 2025 concluded with organizers and supporters commending a week of effective advocacy and awareness. The theme for this year, "Commit to Care," spurred extensive participation and initiatives for accessible, affordable...

news.headline: Loganville Dental in GA is named a 2025 Top Patient Rated Dentist by Find Local Doctors, offering comprehensive dental services under one roof.
news.summary: Loganville Dental, a highly regarded dental practice, provides a wide range of services to address all dental requirements in one convenient location. From routine check-ups to cosmetic procedures and specialized oral care, Loganville Dental offers outstanding service to patients.

news.headline: Code.org launches national campaign 'Computer Science is Everything' to boost girls' enrollment in computer science courses.
news.summary: A national campaign called Computer Science is Everything (CSiE) has been launched by Code.org in Seattle on March 7, 2025. This initiative aims to boost enrollment of high school girls in computer science courses. This marks a significant move towards achieving gender balance in the field, emphasizing the importance of diversity. The campaign seeks to raise awareness and promote inclusivity in computer science education, with the goal of increasing the number of girls pursuing this field across the nation. By providing equal opportunities and encouraging girls to explore computer science, the initiative aims to drive higher enrollment figures and a more diverse student population in high school computer science classes.

news.headline: Effective Fed funds rate 4.33% March 6th vs 4.33% March 5th.
Mexico's Economy Minister Ebrard: Mexico is to meet the USTR representatives next week on trade.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: I have to make trade deals with every country.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: I look forward to coming to India.
Baidu prices US$2 billion offering of zero coupon bonds.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Baidu, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its latest offering. The company, listed on NASDAQ under BIDU and on HKEX under 9888 (HKD) and 89888 (RMB), specializing in AI technologies and internet services, finalized the pricing of a total of US$2 billion in principal amount.

news.headline: Trump orders bitcoin reserve as White House hosts first Crypto Summit with officials & industry leaders.
news.summary: Industry leaders and officials from the Trump administration are set to convene on Friday for the inaugural White House Crypto Summit. During this event, President Trump has taken the unprecedented step of ordering the creation of a bitcoin reserve. This decision underscores the growing importance of cryptocurrencies in the political and economic landscapes. The development comes ahead of the highly anticipated summit and signals a potentially significant shift in official attitudes towards digital assets. For more information, refer to the article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Broadcom's positive AI demand signals rally, reassuring investors worried about slowdown. AI infrastructure revives optimism.
news.summary: Investors received positive news from Broadcom, signaling that the progression of AI infrastructure is still strong. The chipmaker's recent performance has rallied, showing that there is ongoing healthy demand for AI technology. This update comes at a crucial time amid concerns about the pace of AI development.

news.headline: Database includes 1391 entries for Sweden Wind Farms - 17.57 GW Onshore and 121 GW Offshore - 13 entries under construction.
news.summary: Recently, a database called the "Sweden Wind Farms Database" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This database contains a total of 1391 entries, with 17.57 GW dedicated to onshore wind farms and 121 GW to offshore wind farms in Sweden. The breakdown of the data is as follows: In the onshore market, there are 13 entries under construction (totaling 0.97 GW) and 1196 operational entries (totaling 16.61 GW). Regarding offshore wind farms, there are 75 planned entries (totaling 117.57 GW), 5 approved entries (totaling 3.24 GW), and 7 operational entries (totaling 0.19 GW).

news.headline: Over 2 million high school seniors & college students in California eligible for CalKIDS scholarships worth up to $1,500.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California on March 7, 2025, it was reported that college acceptance and financial aid notifications are being received by high school seniors and college students in the state. A key opportunity to alleviate education expenses is available through the CalKIDS program. This initiative, which is the largest of its kind in the country, aims to assist individuals in managing their education expenses effectively.

news.headline: NYSE Pre-market update for March 7th, 2025 on PRNewswire offers insights before trading, delivered by Kristen Scholer.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced the launch of a new daily pre-market update available directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. This update, presented by Kristen Scholer, offers valuable market insights to traders before the beginning of trading each day. Investors can now access this crucial information to better inform their trading decisions. Stay ahead of the market curve with the NYSE Pre-market update for the latest trends and analysis.

news.headline: Academy Sports + Outdoors raises quarterly cash dividend to $0.13 per share for fiscal quarter ended February 1, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Katy, Texas, Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASO) disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for the fiscal quarter concluding on February 1, 2025.

news.headline: US economy adds 151,000 jobs in February, unemployment rate rises to 4.1% from 4.0%, disappointing expectations.
news.summary: In the recent February jobs report released by the Bureau of Labor and Statistics, there was a notable uptick in employment alongside a slight rise in the unemployment rate. The United States saw an increase of 151,000 jobs during the month, which was an improvement from the revised 125,000 jobs added in January but fell short of the projected 160,000 jobs. The unexpected rise in the unemployment rate brought it up to 4.1%, surpassing the anticipated 4.0%. The number of unemployed individuals rose by 203,000, reaching 7.05 million. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com, including insights on the surprising expansion of the US services sector in February despite the deceleration in job growth.

news.headline: February jobs report: moderate hiring before DOGE layoffs and Trump tariffs. S&P 500 futures rise.
news.summary: In February, there was a slight increase in employment as shown in the latest jobs report. However, this positive trend was overshadowed by the beginning of job reductions in DOGE and the implementation of tariffs by the Trump administration by the middle of the month. The S&P 500 futures responded positively to this news.

news.headline: China's NPC meeting is showing positive signs for investors with market rebound - Chinese equities up 5-9% recently. Target growth rate set at 5%.
news.summary: The annual National People's Congress in China began on March 5 and is scheduled to conclude on March 11. Adam Turnquist of LPL Financial highlights that despite the NPC serving as a rubber stamp for party policies, investors are closely watching its proceedings. The market has responded positively, with Chinese equities surging and fixed income markets showing activity. Exchange-traded funds like FXI, KWEB, and MCHI have seen gains of 5.48%, 9.88%, and 5.90% respectively in the past five days. Premier Li Qiang reiterated China's 2025 growth target of 5%, the third consecutive year with this goal. While anticipated, economists are doubtful and predict growth nearer to 4.5%. The government plans to boost growth through fiscal stimulus. The article indicates that the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Spirit Blockchain Capital and Astralane form partnership to launch Staked SOL Index merging DeFi and traditional finance markets.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 07, 2025, Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE: SPIR), a Canadian company offering diversified exposure to blockchain and digital assets, has revealed an enhanced strategic partnership with Astralane, a prominent web3 infrastructure company under Audace Labs. This partnership aims to utilize Astralane's institutional-grade staking infrastructure to bring Solana's decentralized finance (DeFi) yields to traditional finance markets. The collaboration also includes plans to develop the staked SOL Index into an Exchange-Traded Product (ETP).

news.headline: ParaZero and ABOT launch ABOT-PZ drone under SafeAir brand with CE Class C5 certification, entering European market.
news.summary: The inaugural purchase has been made for the newly introduced ABOT-ParaZero SafeAir product line. The order is for the ABOT-PZ model, which is backed by a CE Class C5 certification.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital named top in Tampa Bay, top 3 in Florida, top 100 in US, and one of world's best for 7th year.
news.summary: Tampa General Hospital, the sole academic health system affiliated with the region's university, has secured a spot as one of the top three hospitals in Florida, ranked among the top 100 hospitals nationwide. The hospital's outstanding patient care has also garnered global recognition from Newsweek. This prestigious status highlights its exceptional performance and dedication to healthcare. Tampa General Hospital, located in TAMPA, Fla., has been recognized for its excellence in patient care and achievement in the medical field.

news.headline: ECD Auto Design reveals Project Blanca: a stunning customized Defender 110 with Chawton White finish and Zermatt Silver accents.
news.summary: In Kissimmee, Florida on March 07, 2025, ECD Auto Design unveiled Project Blanca, a unique Defender 110. This singular vehicle combines elegance, innovation, and off-road prowess. The bespoke build showcases a striking Chawton White exterior with Zermatt Silver accents, a laser-cut vertical grille, and French oak wood inserts gracing the side steps and custom bumper. This exclusive creation is designed to capture attention wherever it goes. For visuals of this remarkable creation, click the link provided.

news.headline: Join the webcast on North Media's annual report for 2024, open to all investors. Date and time TBA.
Report forecasts $1.2 billion spending on FRMCS-ready 5G/LTE networks for railways between 2024-2027.
news.summary: A new report on private 5G/4G cellular networks for railways spanning from 2024 to 2030 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. The report from SNS Telecom & IT highlights that expenditure on FRMCS-capable 5G and LTE networks is projected to hit $1.2 billion from 2024 to 2027. It offers comprehensive market analysis and predictions for private 5G and LTE networks in 16 sector verticals, with a specific focus on railways.

news.headline: US established strategic Bitcoin reserve without taxpayer money, sets BTC apart from altcoins. No other crypto recognized by US.
news.summary: An executive order has been issued to establish a strategic reserve of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), receiving praise for effectively differentiating Bitcoin from other cryptocurrencies. Castle Island Ventures general partner Nic Carter highlighted the success of this move, stating that it fulfilled a campaign promise and set Bitcoin apart from all other digital coins. Notably, Bitcoin is the only cryptocurrency to receive official recognition from the U.S. government. It is worthwhile to mention that the acquisition of BTC for this reserve did not involve any taxpayer funds, hence preventing any public backlash. This decision has been highly regarded, providing a clear framework for Bitcoin's unique position in the digital currency landscape.

news.headline: Ringkjøbing Landbobank A/S's Articles of Association were approved May 21; 50 votes in favor and 5 against.
Mexico Economy Minister: We have to reach an agreement about steel and aluminum.
Mexico's Foreign Min. Ebrard: 85-90% of trade to the US are exempt from tariffs through April.
ECB's Kazaks: Services inflation still needs to ease more.
Russia has every reason to confiscate British property in Russia in response to the transfer of Russian assets to Ukraine - Tass Cites Parliament Speaker.
ATS achieves ISO/IEC 17025:2017 accreditation for UK calibration site, enhancing technical capabilities.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Advanced Technology Services, Inc. (ATS) revealed the successful accreditation of its inaugural UK calibration site under ISO/IES 17025:2017 standards. This milestone showcases ATS as a frontrunner in empowering firms to enhance their technical proficiency.

news.headline: ECB's Kazaks: We must keep an open mind for April amid uncertainty.
ECB's Kazaks: The task is 2% inflation, not reaching the neutral rate.
ECB's Kazaks: Uncertainty is much higher.
Trump's memecoin venture earns $350M in 18 days, criticized as a bad example by expert.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency project affiliated with former U.S. President Donald Trump has reportedly generated a substantial $350 million through the sale of his memecoin. This amount was amassed within three weeks from the launch in January, according to a report by the Financial Times. The memecoin, known as $TRUMP, lacks any practical utility and was unveiled by Trump and First Lady Melania before his White House return, prompting significant criticism. The Financial Times calculated the revenue by monitoring the movement of tokens from their inception to official wallets and subsequent listing on trading platforms operating within the Solana blockchain. Within just 18 days of its launch, Trump-associated accounts withdrew $350 million from the main liquidity pool, sparking further discussions about the project's implications.

news.headline: PDS Biotech starts Phase 3 trial for Versamune® HPV in HPV16-positive head and neck cancer - first of its kind.
news.summary: A groundbreaking Phase 3 clinical trial is underway for the first ever HPV16-positive head and neck cancer patient. This trial marks an important advancement in cancer research, as it targets a specific type of cancer that has not been studied in this capacity before. The trial is set to include a significant number of participants, offering hope for those affected by HPV16-positive head and neck cancer. The outcomes of this trial could potentially revolutionize treatment options for this particular group of cancer patients.

news.headline: NATSO's Government Affairs Committee adopts 2025 policy priorities at February meeting in Vegas. Core legislative focuses set for the year.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on March 7, 2025, the NATSO Government Affairs Committee announced its key legislative and regulatory agenda for the year 2025 during its February meeting at NATSO Connect in Las Vegas, Nevada. The core priorities for NATSO this year will center around...

Noodle and ETS introduce GEMS to help universities with enrollment, effective from March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Today in Princeton, N.J., on March 7, 2025, Noodle and ETS unveiled the Graduate Enrollment Matching Service (GEMS), a new offering from the leading learning and marketing technology provider for universities and the global education and talent solutions organization. GEMS aims to provide cost-effective solutions for graduate enrollment.

news.headline: Cadiz Inc. to offer $20 million in 5,715,000 shares of common stock in a direct offering.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Los Angeles, Cadiz Inc., a company specializing in water solutions based in California, disclosed that it has finalized a placement agent agreement for the procurement and distribution of 5,715,000 shares of its common stock. This move signifies a strategic financial decision for the company.

news.headline: HelloSpace+ @ FM 1044 in New Braunfels offers premium self-storage just in time for St. Patrick's Specials, with Grand Opening Celebrations to Follow! 1954 location opens on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Get ready to take advantage of St. Patrick's Day specials with the grand opening of a new premium self-storage facility in New Braunfels, Texas. HelloSpace+ @ FM 1044 is now available for customers at 1954. Don't miss the chance to secure one of these exclusive storage spaces just in time for the holiday, as celebrations for the grand opening are set to follow.
